description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage using the alpine:3.15 Docker image. Add a test job that runs in the test stage, sets PATH to include /root/.cask/bin in a before_script, then executes: apk update && apk add openssh make git curl python3 emacs openssh bash git stow; git clone https://github.com/cask/cask ~/.cask; cask install; cask exec ert-runner. The job has no caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules.
